title: mathewsia linearifolia
intro: Mathewsia linearifolia, also known as the False Hellebore, is a plant species in the family Cleomaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Mathewsia linearifolia is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
